SawEggs - Variable in class org.sim.fish.FOVInfo

SawFood - Variable in class org.sim.fish.FOVInfo
 
SawUnfertilizedEggs - Variable in class org.sim.fish.FOVInfo
 
Scale(float, float) - Static method in class org.sim.RND
Scales a raw number down to a proportional value based on a maximum limit.
Scale(float, float, float) - Static method in class org.sim.RND
Scales a raw number and applies an extra weight multiplier factor.
Searching - Enum constant in enum class org.sim.fish.FishStateTypes
 
settings() - Method in class org.sim.Processing
 
setup() - Method in class org.sim.Processing
 
Setup() - Method in class org.sim.SimManager
Initializes biomes and fish.
sex - Variable in class org.sim.fish.Fish
 
Sex - Enum Class in org.sim.fish.genes
Defines the biological gender of a fish entity.
SHALLOW_BIOME_COLOR - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
SHALLOW_BIOME_ENERGY_MAX - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
SHALLOW_BIOME_PLANT_ENERGY - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
SHALLOW_BIOME_UPPER_BORDER - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
SIDEBAR_WIDTH - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
SIM_DATA_GATHERING_RATE - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
SimDataMonitor - Class in org.sim
Collects population statistics and genetic averages during the simulation.
SimDataMonitor() - Constructor for class org.sim.SimDataMonitor
 
SimManager - Class in org.sim
Main manager class that controls the core simulation loop.
SimManager(Processing, SimDataMonitor) - Constructor for class org.sim.SimManager
Creates a new simulation manager with graphics and data collection modules.
SpawnEntity(Entity) - Static method in class org.sim.SimManager
Safely queues a new entity (such as a baby fish, a laid egg, or a piece of meat) to be added into the simulation world at the start of the next frame.
SpawnPlants() - Method in class org.sim.Biome
Spawns new plant entities inside the biome boundaries if the total energy limit is not exceeded.
Speed() - Method in record class org.sim.fish.genes.Genes
Returns the value of the Speed record component.
SPEED_COST_MODIFIER - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
SPEED_MUTATION_WEIGHT - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
StarvingEnergyMin - Static variable in class org.sim.fish.Fish
 
State<T,E> - Class in org.sim
Abstract template class for implementing state behaviors in the Finite State Machine (FSM).
State(T, E) - Constructor for class org.sim.State
Binds the state to a specific actor object and registers its type.
stats_display(Fish) - Method in class org.sim.Processing
Selects a specific fish to display its detailed properties and genes in the UI sidebar.
